title: Korean-Style Steak with Bulgogi Sauce
description: Marinate steak in a sweet and savory Korean-inspired bulgogi sauce, then grill to perfection. Serve with a side of spicy mustardy kick.

ingredients.name: Flank Steak
ingredients.notes: Slice into thin strips before serving

instructions: 1. In a large bowl, whisk together soy sauce, brown sugar, garlic, and ginger.
2. Add the sliced steak to the marinade, turning to coat. Cover and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
4. Remove the steak from the marinade, letting any excess liquid drip off.
5. Brush the grill with sesame oil to prevent sticking.
6. Grill the steak for 4-5 minutes per side, or until cooked to desired level of doneness.
7. Let the steak rest for 5 minutes before slicing into thin strips.
8. Meanwhile, mix together bulgogi sauce and mustardy sauce (if using).
9. Brush the sauce onto the grilled steak during the last minute of cooking.
10. Garnish with chopped green onions and toasted sesame seeds. Serve immediately.
